name: donchian_breakout_trend_ger40_m15
hypothesis: On GER40 M15, Donchian(40) breakouts filtered by ADX(14) > 22 (trending regime) produce positive expectancy during the European cash session, because index futures tend to trend on confirmed volatility expansion.

signals.entry_long: close > donchian_high(40)[1] AND adx(14) > 22 AND session_mask(07:00-15:30 UTC)
signals.entry_short: close < donchian_low(40)[1] AND adx(14) > 22 AND session_mask(07:00-15:30 UTC)

regime_filter.rationale: Breakouts only in trending + non-dead volatility regimes.

entry_rules.trend_alignment: long requires close > ema(50); short requires close < ema(50)
entry_rules.confirmation: Bar close beyond donchian, enter next bar open.
